bot_goal: ¿Cómo puedo ayudarte?. Dime lo que necesitas.
product_service: Servicios de Rendimiento y Recuperación Deportiva
welcome_message: Hi! I am your workshop chatbot. Ask me about the company, and try switching models and tools to compare token usage and speed.
escalation_text: I recommend contacting a human from the company for this case.
examples_of_good_questions: What services does the company offer?
